meta_title: Create a Website — AI Builder in 2 Minutes | Promto
meta_description: Creating a website with our AI builder is simple. Describe your business — and a ready-made designed website appears in 2 minutes. Try it on Promto.ai.
og_title: Create a Website in 2 Minutes — Promto AI
og_description: Promto AI website builder: describe your business in text and get a ready website in 2 minutes. No code or skills required.
hero_subtitle: Describe your business — and get a ready website in 2 minutes. It's simple: write — receive — publish.
hero_placeholder: Describe the website you want to create...

advantages.title: 2 Minutes to Creation
advantages.description: AI generates the website immediately after your description. No more waiting for days.

advantages.title: Quality Design
advantages.description: The website looks professional and modern — without spending on a designer.

advantages.title: Everything Included
advantages.description: Texts, structure, images, SEO settings — everything is generated automatically.

advantages.title: Ready to Publish
advantages.description: The website works on the internet immediately. Connect your domain or use ours.

advantages.title: Mobile Responsive
advantages.description: The website automatically looks great on phones, tablets, and computers.

advantages.title: Free Updates
advantages.description: Edit and improve your website anytime — no restrictions and no developer needed.

how_it_works.title: Describe Your Business
how_it_works.description: Tell us about yourself or your company in a few sentences: what you do, for whom, what services you offer.

how_it_works.title: AI Creates Your Website
how_it_works.description: The neural network analyzes your description and generates the structure, texts, color scheme, and website blocks.

how_it_works.title: Review and Adjust
how_it_works.description: If needed, change any element: text, photos, blocks, colors — all in the visual editor.

how_it_works.title: Publish
how_it_works.description: One click — and your website is live. Share the link with customers or connect your domain.

faq.question: What kind of website can I create with the AI builder?
faq.answer: Suitable for landing pages, service websites, portfolios, sites for restaurants, salons, workshops, agencies, and many other directions.

faq.question: Do I need to know how to program?
faq.answer: No. Promto is designed for those who don't know code. Just describe your business in words — AI will handle the rest.

faq.question: How long does it take to create a website?
faq.answer: The first version of the website is ready in 2 minutes after entering your description. Refinement and publishing — just a couple more minutes.

faq.question: Can I add my own domain?
faq.answer: Yes. On paid plans, you can connect any domain. The free plan works on a Promto subdomain.

faq.question: Is the builder suitable for selling products?
faq.answer: Yes, you can create a website with a product catalog, prices, and an order form. Extended features are available for a full online store.

faq.question: Is there support if I have questions?
faq.answer: Yes. Priority chat support is available on paid plans. There's also a knowledge base and user community.

cta_mid_subtitle: It's free and fast. Describe your business — and the website is ready in 2 minutes.
cta_final_title: Your Website Is Waiting for You
cta_final_subtitle: Just get started. Describe your business — and AI will create the website in 2 minutes.
